writer: Silvio Horta, Paul Harris Boardman, Scott Derrickson
actors: Jennifer Morrison, Matthew Davis, Hart Bochner
plot: Urban Legends: The Final Cut follows Amy Mayfield (Morrison), a student at Alpine University who struggles to complete her thesis film on urban legends - only to have her crew members fall prey to fatal 'accidents.' Suspicious, Amy investigates and discovers a much more sinister hand at work. Now she must unmask the killer before she, too, becomes an urban legend.
